calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-07-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF NORTH STAR CAPITAL ACQUISITION'S NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Granted in part. Judgment debtor shall pay $50 per month to judgment creditor towards the judgment. Order signed. (302/HEK) Judge: Harold Kahn, Reporter: LaVena Ward, CSR #7077
